noticias.titulo: SpaceX IPO: 5 Surprising Facts Just Revealed
noticias.resumen: SpaceX just filed its S-1 ahead of what could be the largest IPO in history.

noticias.titulo: The Hanover Insurance Group (THG): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
noticias.resumen: The Hanover Insurance Group has been treading water for the past six months, holding steady at $186.29. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 10.9% gain during that period.

noticias.titulo: B&G Foods (BGS): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
noticias.resumen: Over the past six months, B&G Foods’s shares (currently trading at $4.09) have posted a disappointing 12.2% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 10.9% gain. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

noticias.titulo: 3 Reasons to Sell FLG and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
noticias.resumen: Flagstar Financial has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 13.3% to $14.06 per share while the index has gained 10.9%.
